fieldDescription:
Sets whether or not expeditions can happen in a campaign.

Default Value: True

Sets the interval between each expedition in days as well as the grace period for the first expedition.

Default Value: 94

Sets whether or not incursions can happen in a campaign.

Default Value: True

Sets the interval between each incursion in days as well as the grace period for the first incursion.

Default Value: 183

Sets whether or not excavations can happen in a campaign.

Default Value: True

Sets the interval between excavations in days as well as the grace period for the first excavation.

Default Value: 183

Sets whether or not acquisitions can happen in a campaign.

Default Value: True

Sets the interval between acquisitions in days as well as the grace period for the first acquisition.

Default Value: 183
